text:
Question: Which process do plants use to make sugar from sunlight?
Item serial: 1
Options:
A. Photosynthesis
B. Condensation
C. Fermentation
D. Evaporation
label: A

text:
Question: Which force pulls objects toward Earth?
Item serial: 2
Options:
(A) Friction
(B) Gravity
(C) Magnetism
(D) Buoyancy
label: B

text:

Item serial: 3
Options:
A: Proton
B: Neutron
C: Electron
D: Nucleus
label: C

D. Evaporation
label: D
